prompt: Ultra-premium eastern fantasy novel cover background. Theme: the weak outer disciple becomes the one who plays the game of heaven. Show a lone young male cultivator, Ning Chen, on dangerous stone steps high above Qingyun Sect, gazing toward a celestial causality orb splitting the void above the mountains. The world is in spiritual decline; the atmosphere carries despair, ambition, secrecy, and fate. Use broken golden causality lines in the sky like shattered destiny, ancient sect architecture below, misty cliffs, restrained violet lightning, and refined negative space for a title at the top. It must feel elegant, elite, majestic, and art-directed by a professional publishing team. No text, no watermark.
composition: vertical premium book cover, 2:3, title-safe negative space in upper quarter, lone hero in lower third, layered depth
style: high-end cinematic fantasy painting, premium publishing cover illustration, refined and dramatic
lighting: celestial gold against dark blue storm sky, subtle violet veins, controlled contrast, luxurious atmosphere
palette: obsidian black, midnight blue, antique gold, moonlit white, restrained violet
constraints: must feel sophisticated and commercially polished, not generic, not busy, one male character only, no text
negative: cheap poster, anime, game splash art, low detail, blurry face, clutter, watermark

prompt: Luxury Chinese xianxia book cover background with immense atmosphere. A lone young male cultivator in a worn gray outer disciple robe stands before a towering broken bronze heavenly gate under a sky cracked by a radiant ancient causality seed. Golden fate-lines and violet lightning tear through dark storm clouds. The mountains feel ancient, cruel, and sacred. The image should feel like blockbuster fantasy key art designed by a professional studio for a bestselling Chinese web novel, dark and expensive, with clear space for elegant title typography. No text, no watermark.
composition: dramatic vertical poster, 2:3, large sky object above, hero in lower third, title-safe negative space
style: epic Chinese fantasy key art, premium publishing cover, painterly realism
lighting: dark environment with concentrated gold and violet celestial light, strong contrast, volumetric rays
palette: black, deep blue, antique gold, muted violet, pale white
constraints: must look elite and expensive, not generic, one male figure only, no crowd, no text
negative: low resolution, cheesy fantasy, oversaturated, game UI, modern clothing, watermark
